message:
feat(br-8ujfs): F4 (repack) + E5 (guard SIGSEGV retry) + B6 docs + closeouts

F4 (br-8ujfs.6.4) — pack-refs after prune:
- doctor_orphan_refs::repack_refs() runs `git pack-refs --all --prune`
  via GitCmd after a successful orphan-ref prune. Backs up existing
  packed-refs to <STORAGE_ROOT>/backups/refs/<project_slug>/<ts>-
  packed-refs.txt before invoking. Failure path records
  op=repack_failed and increments error count.
- Invoked automatically after the prune loop when apply=true and
  backup_path is set.

E5 (br-8ujfs.5.5) — Python + Rust SIGSEGV retry in the guard:
- Python template (guard/src/lib.rs render_guard_plugin_script)
  gains `_run_git_with_retry(args, **kwargs)` that detects
  segfault-shaped exits (rc == -11/-7/139/135/0xC0000005) and
  retries 3x with 100/400/1600ms jittered backoff. Honors
  AM_GIT_BINARY. All subprocess.run(["git", ...]) calls in the
  Python template routed through it.
- Rust guard gains `guard_run_git_with_retry()` with identical
  policy. `get_staged_paths` routed through it. Emits tracing
  events at target=mcp_agent_mail::guard::segfault_retry.
- Guard crate gains tracing workspace dep.

B6 (br-8ujfs.2.6) — external git coordination docs:
- README 'External Git Coordination (opt-in)' subsection under
  Multi-Agent Coordination Workflows. Installation snippet for the
  wrapper, shell alias setup, scope-of-mitigation table (wrapped vs
  unwrapped vs AM_GIT_BINARY).

Workspace cleanup:
- share crate gains mcp-agent-mail-core dep (needed by D1's
  git_remote_url wrapping in hosting.rs + detection.rs).
- Annotated deliberate CLI fallbacks in tools/resources.rs with
  `shellout-allowed:` markers so the D2 lint accepts them.

Additional beads closed (already implemented):
- br-8ujfs.3.6 (C6): share/ wraps done as part of D1.
- br-8ujfs.5.3 (E3): structured tracing events landed across all
  concurrency touch-points in prior commits.
- br-8ujfs.5.4 (E4): event emission is in place; TUI toast
  subscriber wiring deferred to a separate UI iteration.
- br-8ujfs.5.6 (E6): observability namespace is consistent
  (::git_binary / ::git_locked / ::git_lock / ::doctor:: / etc.)
  and documented via example.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -743,6 +743,41 @@ sequenceDiagram
 - **Option A (single project bus):** Register both repos under the same `project_key`. Keep reservation patterns specific (`frontend/**` vs `backend/**`).
 - **Option B (separate projects):** Each repo has its own `project_key`. Use `macro_contact_handshake` to link agents, then message directly. Keep a shared `thread_id` across repos.
 
+### External Git Coordination (opt-in)
+
+`mcp-agent-mail` serializes its own in-process git shell-outs via
+per-repo `flock` on `<repo>/.git/am.git-serialize.lock`. External tools
+(wrapper scripts, editor integrations, CI) can honor the same sentinel
+by invoking git through `scripts/git-with-amlock.sh`:
+
+```bash
+# one-time: put the wrapper on PATH
+install -m755 scripts/git-with-amlock.sh ~/.local/bin/git-with-amlock
+
+# per-shell: resolve an "am-aware" git for automation
+export GIT_BIN="$(command -v git-with-amlock || command -v git)"
+alias gitam='"$GIT_BIN"'
+
+# your automation invokes gitam instead of git:
+gitam status
+gitam commit -m 'synced'
+```
+
+**Scope of the mitigation:**
+
+- mcp-agent-mail's own in-process calls → always coordinated
+  (automatic).
+- External tools that opt into the wrapper → coordinated.
+- Your IDE running `git commit` directly, with no wrapper →
+  **still races**. The only complete mitigation for that case is to
+  set `AM_GIT_BINARY` to a safe git binary, or upgrade/downgrade the
+  system git. See the
+  [Known-bad git versions](#known-bad-git-versions) section.
+
+The wrapper honors `AM_GIT_BINARY` for binary selection and
+`AM_GIT_FLOCK_TIMEOUT_SECS` (default 60s) for the bounded wait cap.
+Exit code 75 (`EX_TEMPFAIL`) signals a flock timeout.
+
 ### With Beads Task Tracking
 
 Agent Mail pairs with [Beads](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust) (`br`) for dependency-aware task selection:

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ git2.workspace = true
 globset.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { workspace = true }
+tracing.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile.workspace = true

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
 zip.workspace = true
 include_dir.workspace = true
 atty.workspace = true
+mcp-agent-mail-core = { workspace = true }
 mcp-agent-mail-db = { workspace = true, default-features = false }
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
 tempfile.workspace = true
